opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 534 Google reviews at 4.6 stars with no detected CRM or response tooling in place.
opportunities.observation: Manually managing reputation at 534 reviews likely means many go unanswered, eroding trust.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI to auto-generate personalized responses to new reviews within minutes of posting.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and site serves Boise HVAC with clear seasonal demand cycles.
opportunities.observation: Without automated reminders, seasonal tune-up revenue is left uncaptured from existing customers.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal HVAC maintenance reminders via email and SMS tied to last service date.

opportunities.label: Dormant Customer Reactivation
opportunities.signal: 534 reviews suggest a large customer base but no CRM or re-engagement automation is detected.
opportunities.observation: Past customers in Boise are going to competitors for repeat service with no win-back effort.
opportunities.fix: AI-triggered reactivation campaigns target customers silent 12+ months with personalized service offers.
